title: PaymentMethodUpdateRequest
description: Request body for updating an existing vaulted payment method.

payment_method_nonce.description: A new one-time nonce to replace the underlying payment details while preserving the existing token.

options.description: Options for the payment method update.

make_default.description: If true, this payment method becomes the customer's default.

update_existing_token.description: Token of an existing payment method to update rather than creating a new one.
